g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain block 1: the simulator in detail')
g.text: Provided Docker container — you don't code this

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain block 2: the broker in detail')
g.text: Receives from simulator, broadcasts to all replicas

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain block 3: the processing replicas in detail')
g.text: FFT + classify + persist — can be killed at any time

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain block 5: the Nginx gateway in detail')
g.text: Routes dashboard requests to alive replicas

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain block 6: the React dashboard in detail')
g.text: What the analyst sees — events, filters, real-time feed
